race.comment: The well-related AMUSEANTES (6) (half to G1 winner Startantes) boasts a win around this circuit and will be rock-hard fit for this contest. Looks to be working up to another victory and strikes a winnable assignment here. Rates the testing material. DRAGONNE ROUGE (8) is a bit hit-or-miss but is one from one at this track and is more than capable enough on her day. Sure to play a major role. TOMBA (12) got a confidence-building win over this course and distance last time out and gets a stack of weight off with the 3kg claim. Top-three credentials. TRUE AMOR (1) got the job done here at the latest effort and is another to get some weight relief. In the mix on best form. KOKATAHI (15) best of the rest in a wide-open affair.
